validation_rules: Non-empty; unique per case; alphanumeric; max 64 chars; format PTID-XXXXXXXX
Non-empty; must match WHO Drug Dictionary or company product list; max 200 chars
Non-empty; must resolve to valid MedDRA LLT; max 250 chars; no special characters except hyphens
ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD; must not be future date; must be on or after drug start date
Non-empty; max 100 chars; format Last_First or single name; no numeric characters
Must be one of: initial|follow-up|final; case-insensitive
Valid MedDRA LLT code; 8-digit numeric; must exist in current MedDRA version (v26.1)
Must be one of: certain|probable|possible|unlikely|conditional|unassessable; WHO-UMC scale
